=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
Ravenna,Italy
Palazzo Mauro De Andre'
2002.04.19

I have no info about taper and origin of this recording. Has the same fade at the end of "Summer Days" described for another circulating recording
real good sounding

Disc 1
1 I Am The Man, Thomas (acoustic), 2 The Times They Are A-Changin' (acoustic) (Larry on cittern), 3 It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding) (acoustic), 4 Forever Young (acoustic), 5 Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum, 6 I Threw It All Away, 7 Subterranean Homesick Blues (Larry on slide guitar), 8 Moonlight, 9 It Ain't Me, Babe (acoustic), 10 Tangled Up In Blue (acoustic), 11 Tomorrow Is A Long Time (acoustic), 12 Summer Days (Tony on standup bass), CD2



Disc2
1 Just Like A Woman, 2 All Along The Watchtower, 3 Rainy Day Women #12 & 35, 4 Love Sick, 5 Like A Rolling Stone, 6 I Shall Be Released (acoustic), 7 Honest With Me (Larry on slide guitar), 8 Blowin' In The Wind (acoustic) 




Concert # 1412 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 11 of the 2002 Europe Spring Tour. 2002 concert # 29.

Concert # 29 with the 13th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), Charlie Sexton (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), George Recile (drums & percussion).

1–4, 9-11, 18, 20 acoustic with the band.
4, 6, 9, 11, 13, 20 Bob Dylan (harmonica).
2, 3 Larry Campbell (cittern).
1, 4, 18, 20 Larry Campbell & Charlie Sexton (backup vocals).

13 new songs (65%) compared to previous concert. 2 new songs for this tour
